title: Doctor nowhere mod (chaos edition)
description: A modpack that has multiple events and entities. It is more simple then the regular mod.
body:
this modpack can be extremely chaotic. It adds sevral events and entities that roam your world at night. The player will walk around the world and occasionally strange creepy events will occur. The entities in this mod are: The locust, Guilt, Boiled one, The boiled one phenomenon.
This modpack adds a very eerie experience with other horror mods.
